C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. EHEWLETT, JUDGE; CGEHLING, CLERK; CGALLAGHER, CSR. PLNTF APPR BY ALAN B. AXELROD, ESQ, NO APPR FOR DEF. WIT SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOC EVIDENCE INTRO AND WITHDRAWN. COURT FINDS FOR PLNTF LINDQUIST, VON HUSEN & JOYCE AND AGAINST DEF JOEL G. RITCHIE, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA PROFESSIONAL COURIER SYSTEMS FOR THE SUM OF $2,165.76 PLUS POST-JUDGMENT INTEREST AT THE LEGAL RATE. THE COURT FURTHER FINDS JUDGMENT FOR CROSS-DEFENDANT LINDQUIST, VON HUSEN & JOYCE AND AGAINST CROSS-COMPLAINANT PROFESSIONAL MESSENGER, DBA PROFESSIONAL COURIER SYSTEMS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RITCHIE, JOEL G. INDIVIDUALLY & DBA AS PROFESSIONAL COURIER SYSTEMS PROFESSIONAL MESSENGER DBA PROFESSIONAL COURIER SY $2,165.76 PRINCIPAL, $545.90 INTEREST, $129.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,840.66, PLUS COSTS PURSUANT TO COST BILL. CROSS-COMPLAINANT SHALL TAKE NOTHING BY WAY OF CROSS COMPLAINT.
